image.title: NAH González-Pacheco, LM Amezcua-Guerra, J Sandoval, A Arias-Mendoza

item.title: Potential usefulness of pentoxifylline, a non-specific phosphodiesterase inhibitor with anti-inflammatory, anti-thrombotic, antioxidant, and anti-fibrogenic properties, in the treatment of SARS-CoV-2.
